records.question: Which courses have a course description of p and a course name of ds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
WHERE courses.course_description = 'p' AND courses.course_name = 'ds'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses where lower(courses.course_description) like '%p%' and lower(courses.course_name) like '%ds%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter courses by course_description containing 'p' and course_name containing 'ds' using case-insensitive matching.

records.question: What courses named exactly rs have enrolled students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
WHERE courses.course_name = 'rs'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join student_enrolment_courses on courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id where lower(courses.course_name) = 'rs' limit 5;
records.thought: To find courses named exactly 'rs' that have enrolled students, join Courses with Student_Enrolment_Courses and filter by course_name = 'rs'.

records.question: Which courses have the name ml and include sections described as qui?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE courses.course_name = 'ml' AND sections.section_description = 'qui'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join sections on courses.course_id = sections.course_id where lower(courses.course_name) like '%ml%' and lower(sections.section_description) like '%qui%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find courses with names containing 'ml' and that have sections with descriptions containing 'qui'. This requires joining Courses and Sections and filtering on both conditions.

records.question: What courses named db with a description of q were offered in the spring 2019 semester?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN semesters ON student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id
WHERE semesters.semester_name = 'spring 2019' AND courses.course_name = 'db' AND courses.course_description = 'q'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join student_enrolment_courses on courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id join student_enrolment on student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id join semesters on student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id where lower(courses.course_name) like '%db%' and lower(courses.course_description) like '%q%' and lower(semesters.semester_name) like '%spring 2019%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find courses named like 'db' with descriptions containing 'q' offered in the spring 2019 semester, join Courses with Student_Enrolment_Courses, Student_Enrolment, and Semesters filtering by semester_name and course_name and description patterns.

records.question: What courses named dl with description l have a section named a where the section description is non?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
WHERE sections.section_description = 'non' AND sections.section_name = 'a' AND courses.course_name = 'dl' AND courses.course_description = 'l'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join sections on sections.course_id = courses.course_id where lower(courses.course_name) like '%dl%' and lower(courses.course_description) like '%l%' and lower(sections.section_name) like '%a%' and lower(sections.section_description) like '%non%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter courses with names containing 'dl' and descriptions containing 'l', join with sections having name containing 'a' and description containing 'non'.

records.question: Which courses named en with a description of k have sections named o where the section description is et?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'k' AND sections.section_description = 'et' AND courses.course_name = 'en' AND sections.section_name = 'o'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join sections on sections.course_id = courses.course_id where lower(courses.course_name) like '%en%' and lower(courses.course_description) like '%k%' and lower(sections.section_name) like '%o%' and lower(sections.section_description) like '%et%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find courses with course_name containing 'en' and course_description containing 'k', joined with sections where section_name contains 'o' and section_description contains 'et'.

records.question: Which courses have a section where the section_name is o?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
WHERE sections.section_name = 'o'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join sections on courses.course_id = sections.course_id where lower(sections.section_name) like '%o%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find courses that have a section with section_name 'o', join Courses and Sections on course_id and filter sections with section_name like '%o%'.

records.question: What courses have the course name exactly rs with a course description exactly v?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
WHERE courses.course_name = 'rs' AND courses.course_description = 'v'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses where lower(courses.course_name) = 'rs' and lower(courses.course_description) = 'v' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter courses where course_name is exactly 'rs' and course_description is exactly 'v'.

records.question: Which courses were taken in the semester described as l during spring 2012?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN semesters ON student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id
WHERE semesters.semester_description = 'l' AND semesters.semester_name = 'spring 2012'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join student_enrolment_courses on courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id join student_enrolment on student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id join semesters on student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id where lower(semesters.semester_name) like '%spring 2012%' and lower(semesters.semester_description) like '%l%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find courses taken in the semester described as 'l' during spring 2012, I join Courses with Student_Enrolment_Courses, Student_Enrolment, and Semesters filtering semester_name for spring 2012 and semester_description like '%l%'.

records.question: Which math courses with a description exactly q were taken by students whose SSN is 39, other details are nesciunt, email is qo'kon@example.com, and who left on or after 1990-09-01 05:03:27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'q' AND students.ssn = '39' AND courses.course_name = 'math' AND students.other_student_details = 'nesciunt' AND students.date_left >= '1990-09-01 05:03:27' AND students.email_address = 'qo''kon@example.com'
records.pred_sql: select courses.course_id from courses join student_enrolment_courses sec on courses.course_id = sec.course_id join student_enrolment se on sec.student_enrolment_id = se.student_enrolment_id join students s on se.student_id = s.student_id where lower(courses.course_description) = 'q' and lower(courses.course_name) like '%math%' and s.ssn = '39' and lower(s.other_student_details) like '%nesciunt%' and lower(s.email_address) like '%qo''kon@example.com%' and s.date_left >= '1990-09-01 05:03:27' limit 5
records.thought: Filter students by ssn, other details, email, and date_left, join with enrolment and courses, and filter courses with description exactly 'q' and course_name containing 'math'.
